candidates.why: Exact total current assets line on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Wrong section; non-current rather than current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact cash and cash equivalents balance-sheet line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalent at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalent at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not the year-end balance-sheet cash target.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line.

candidates.why: Exact total current liabilities line on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current liabilities.
Wrong section; non-current rather than current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Current part of long term interest-bearing debt
candidates.why: Direct match to current maturities/current portion of long-term debt; clearly part of short-term debt.
Appears in current-liability section and likely captures short-term bank borrowings; useful alongside current maturities if not overlapping.
Current lease liability, but STD baseline explicitly excludes leases.
Operating liability, not debt.

final_choice.row_label: Current part of long term interest-bearing debt

variables.notes: R:nc. Included current maturities and bank debt as the minimal financing-related current debt set, excluding lease liabilities. Manual review because duplicated 'Bank debts' labels in the statement create some ambiguity about exact scope and potential overlap.

candidates.why: Exact taxes payable/current tax liability label.

variables.notes: Exact tax payable label exists even though recent preview values are blank.

candidates.why: Best reported balance-sheet total for property, plant and equipment / tangible fixed assets; preferable to component lines.
PPE component only, not total PPE.
Conceptually strong but values are blank and gross is less preferred than reported net total here.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-related gross component, not preferred total PPE measure.

variables.notes: R:c. Used the total tangible assets line as the best available PPE proxy on the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line.
Only a non-current asset subset, not total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total assets line.

candidates.why: Best direct match to net operating cash flow / operating cash flow.
Also an operating cash flow line, but appears less final than the net operating cash flow line given coexistence with 'Net cash flow from operations'.

variables.notes: Chose the net operating cash flow label as primary; included the alternate operating cash flow label as lower-priority because labels vary over time.
